title: Robinhood links with dYdX Labs to launch new DEX Arcus
message_html: Robinhood links with dYdX Labs to launch new DEX Arcus ...
snippet: The crypto protocol dYdX has rebranded as Arcus and is joining Robinhood’s new blockchain to bring perpetual and tokenized stock trading.

title: Lightspark becomes first payments company in Estonia to get MiCA licence
message_html: Lightspark becomes first payments company in Estonia to get MiCA licence ...
snippet: Today, Lightspark Payments Europe AS announced it received a crypto-asset service provider (CASP) authorization under the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA), together with authorization to operate as an electronic money institution (EMI), from Estonia's Financial Supervision Authority (

title: Bernstein sees 203% upside for Circle even as new stablecoin rival OUSD debuts
message_html: Bernstein sees 203% upside for Circle even as new stablecoin rival OUSD debuts ...
snippet: Bernstein reaffirms Outperform on Circle with a $190 target after OUSD's launch sent CRCL stock down over 17%.
